name: audit-garantie-vw-monorepo
description: Application de gestion d'audits de garantie VW - Optimisée

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd client && npm start"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../client && npm install

author: Holert Fabien
